## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the change locally with `python3 papyrus.py`
- [ ] `papyrus.py` remains a single file (no new modules)
- [ ] No new dependencies were added
- [ ] Code style matches the existing codebase
